title: Surgeon Vacancy at Divi's Laboratories International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Divi's Laboratories International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Divi's Laboratories International Enterprises has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Bhopal office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Divi's Laboratories International Enterprises:
Divi's Laboratories International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Divi's Laboratories International Enterprises!
